hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); SID=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty'); CWD=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty'); WSL_HOST=$([ -n "$WSL_DISTRO_NAME" ] && grep -m1 nameserver /etc/resolv.conf 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}'); curl -s -m 1 -G --data-urlencode "source=codex" --data-urlencode "session_id=$SID" --data-urlencode "cwd=$CWD" --data-urlencode "event=start" "http://${WSL_HOST:-127.0.0.1}:57017/hook" 2>/dev/null || { [ -n "$WSL_HOST" ] && curl -s -m 1 -G --data-urlencode "source=codex" --data-urlencode "session_id=$SID" --data-urlencode "cwd=$CWD" --data-urlencode "event=start" http://127.0.0.1:57017/hook 2>/dev/null; } || true

INPUT=$(cat); SID=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty'); CWD=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty'); WSL_HOST=$([ -n "$WSL_DISTRO_NAME" ] && grep -m1 nameserver /etc/resolv.conf 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}'); curl -s -m 1 -G --data-urlencode "source=codex" --data-urlencode "session_id=$SID" --data-urlencode "cwd=$CWD" --data-urlencode "event=thinking" "http://${WSL_HOST:-127.0.0.1}:57017/hook" 2>/dev/null || { [ -n "$WSL_HOST" ] && curl -s -m 1 -G --data-urlencode "source=codex" --data-urlencode "session_id=$SID" --data-urlencode "cwd=$CWD" --data-urlencode "event=thinking" http://127.0.0.1:57017/hook 2>/dev/null; } || true

INPUT=$(cat); SID=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty'); CWD=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // empty'); TOOL=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_name // empty'); WSL_HOST=$([ -n "$WSL_DISTRO_NAME" ] && grep -m1 nameserver /etc/resolv.conf 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}'); curl -s -m 1 -G --data-urlencode "source=codex" --data-urlencode "session_id=$SID" --data-urlencode "cwd=$CWD" --data-urlencode "event=tool_use" --data-urlencode "tool_name=$TOOL" "http://${WSL_HOST:-127.0.0.1}:57017/hook" 2>/dev/null || { [ -n "$WSL_HOST" ] && curl -s -m 1 -G --data-urlencode "source=codex" --data-urlencode "session_id=$SID" --data-urlencode "cwd=$CWD" --data-urlencode "event=tool_use" --data-urlencode "tool_name=$TOOL" http://127.0.0.1:57017/hook 2>/dev/null; } || true
